function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"stories": [{"label": "api", "component_name": "api", "requirement_indices": [0, 1], "capability_indices": [], "title": "Implement hello and goodbye endpoints", "intent": "Cohesive api component owns api/app.py and covers the hello + goodbye endpoint requirements (ADR-049 cohesive shape: two capabilities, one entry file, both scenario-evidenced).", "tasks": [{"label": "test-first", "description": "Write failing test for the endpoints", "depends_on_labels": []}, {"label": "impl", "description": "Implement to make the failing test pass", "depends_on_labels": ["test-first"]}, {"label": "verify", "description": "Verify all scenarios pass", "depends_on_labels": ["impl"]}]}, {"label": "ui", "component_name": "ui", "requirement_indices": [2], "capability_indices": [], "title": "Implement UI integration", "intent": "ui component owns ui/app.js and ui/index.html and covers the UI integration requirement (depends on the api endpoints).", "tasks": [{"label": "test-first", "description": "Write failing test for UI fetch and display", "depends_on_labels": []}, {"label": "impl", "description": "Implement to make the failing test pass", "depends_on_labels": ["test-first"]}, {"label": "verify", "description": "Verify all scenarios pass", "depends_on_labels": ["impl"]}]}]}
